state_pressure.basis: June 29 session overlay — gap narrowing; SPX climbing; 10Y still negative; WTI recovering non-driving.

session_context: June 29 session overlay: neutral | stable; gap narrowing; medium confidence, fragile stability.

drafts.x:
Oil is cratering — and the other signals aren't confirming.
Only matters if equities or yields confirms — and it hasn't yet.

SPX 7,411. 10Y 4.38%. Oil $70.

Invalidation:
• SPX breaks above 7,522 or below 7,300
• 10Y moves beyond 4.58% or below 4.18%

What breaks this range — and which direction?
drafts.substack:
REGIME: Neutral | Softening
CONFIDENCE: Medium (48/100)
RISK TILT: neutral
STABILITY: Fragile

Snapshot — Jun 29, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,410.73   z +0.56
  10Y Yield:      4.380%  z -0.37
  WTI Oil:        70.12   z -2.18

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,411 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from equities. 10Y yield at 4.38% is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from yields. Oil at $70 is running well below its 63-session range — oil haven't been this stretched in months. Confidence sits at 48/100 — enough for a directional lean but not a high-conviction call.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,522 or below 7,300
• 10Y moves beyond 4.58% or below 4.18%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.

inv_rows.condition: SPX above 7,522 or below 7,300 → Regime flips

regime_analogs.intro: As of June 29, 2026, three closest structural matches for today’s neutral stable regime — gap narrowing, 10Y still negative, WTI recovering but non-driving. Members search the full 50-year database.

analog_rows.outcome: Regime resolved pro-risk within 4 sessions — SPX cleared the gate as 10Y stabilized near zero and WTI’s recovery continued without driving the read
10Y reversed back negative within 2 sessions — the brief firming faded and the regime stayed pinned for 5 more sessions before resolving defensive
Confidence kept rising for 3 sessions before SPX failed the gate and the regime broke defensive, the early gap-narrowing read did not hold

regime_analogs.context_note: Structural pattern matches only — not predictions. SPX climbing while 10Y firms off its negative cross, with WTI recovering but still 2σ-plus below baseline, is the defining condition. Resolution at 7,522 and 4.58%. Historical context.
